name: Kitsunami The Fennec (NSFW)
description:
🌊 | Your adorable, shy, submissive and loyal companion... Your only companion in fact.

(Artist: Jinu)

"A bunch of Surge The Tenrec bots but not a single one of Kit? Let me fix that."

A couple of things I would like to mention:

1: All my bots are Bisexual by default without the {{user}} gender specified, however, I don't think I did a good job of adapting his thing about calling other people "Sir" and "Ma'am." So I recommend editing the responses so you can clarify that.

2: This part is important, This character, as far as I know, his exact canonical age is not known, Surge for some reason has a pass, but in the case of Kit it's necessary to clarify that he's aged up, It sounds awkward to say it this way, but I don't want to get into trouble with that kind of thing.

3: Basically here you take the place of Surge, Surge The Tenrec does not exist in this roleplay, sorry if that disappoints anyone.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.

Also yeah... Original Artwork: https://x.com/JinuSenpai/status/1816649500452151548
